title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic held a Code with Claude 2026 opening keynote in Tokyo, Japan featuring updates from the company's engineering and product leaders. The event served as a venue for sharing latest developments and strategic directions.
writeup: This video is the opening keynote from Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 developer conference in Tokyo, presented by engineering and product leaders. It serves as the event's kickoff, framing the conference's developer focus and surfacing updates from across the teams. The summary does not specify which products or features were detailed.
